name: Banana Mandarin Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk and stir until smooth. Stir in the fresh lemon juice and vanilla extract.
3. Slice 2 bananas and dip them in fresh lemon juice to prevent browning; set aside to drain excess liquid.
4. Line the bottom of the crust with the banana slices and about two-thirds of the orange segments.
5. Pour the filling over the fruit.
6. Chill for at least 3 hours, or until set.
7. Before serving, slice the remaining bananas and dip them in fresh lemon juice to prevent browning; add them to the dish.
8. Garnish with the remaining orange segments.
9. Refrigerate any leftovers.
